problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
hypothesis: Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region may resolve Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
